ddls:
CREATE TABLE "world_cup_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the World Cup */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team name (winner is bolded) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties awarded to the team */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "shots_wide" INTEGER /* Total shots that went wide */,
  "free_kicks" INTEGER /* Total free kicks awarded */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Total times caught offside */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total corners taken */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Total matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Total matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Total matches lost */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Total own goals scored by the team */,
  "average_possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage in matches */,
  "average_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Average pass accuracy percentage */,
  "average_shot_accuracy" REAL /* Average shot accuracy percentage */,
  "average_fouls_conceded" REAL /* Average fouls conceded per match */,
  "average_fouls_won" REAL /* Average fouls won per match */,
  "average_corners_conceded" REAL /* Average corners conceded per match */,
  "average_cornerns_won" REAL /* Average corners won per match */,
  "total_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of player injuries during the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "team"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_cup_data_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES teams ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the team represents */,
  "fifa_rank" INTEGER /* FIFA ranking of the team */,
  "total_world_cup_appearances" INTEGER /* Total number of World Cup appearances by the team */,
  "total_world_cup_titles" INTEGER /* Total number of World Cup titles won by the team */,
  "total_world_cup_finals" INTEGER /* Total number of World Cup finals the team has reached */,
  "total_world_cup_top_4" INTEGER /* Total number of times the team has reached the top 4 in the World Cup */,
  "total_world_cup_top_8" INTEGER /* Total number of times the team has reached the top 8 in the World Cup */,
  "total_world_cup_top_16" INTEGER /* Total number of times the team has reached the top 16 in the World Cup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the World Cup */,
  "team_a" TEXT /* Team A competing in the match */,
  "team_b" TEXT /* Team B competing in the match */,
  "goals_a" INTEGER /* Goals scored by Team A */,
  "goals_b" INTEGER /* Goals scored by Team B */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Venue where match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES tournaments ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b FOREIGN KEY ("team_b") REFERENCES teams ("iso_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a FOREIGN KEY ("team_a") REFERENCES teams ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "shots_on_goal_a" INTEGER /* Shots on goal by Team A */,
  "shots_on_goal_b" INTEGER /* Shots on goal by Team B */,
  "corners_a" INTEGER /* Corners taken by Team A */,
  "corners_b" INTEGER /* Corners taken by Team B */,
  "fouls_a" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by Team A */,
  "fouls_b" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by Team B */,
  "possession_a" REAL /* Percentage of possession for Team A */,
  "possession_b" REAL /* Percentage of possession for Team B */,
  "pass_accuracy_a" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage for Team A */,
  "pass_accuracy_b" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage for Team B */,
  "shot_accuracy_a" REAL /* Shot accuracy percentage for Team A */,
  "shot_accuracy_b" REAL /* Shot accuracy percentage for Team B */,
  "offsides_a" INTEGER /* Offsides committed by Team A */,
  "offsides_b" INTEGER /* Offsides committed by Team B */,
  "yellow_cards_a" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by Team A */,
  "yellow_cards_b" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by Team B */,
  "red_cards_a" INTEGER /* Red cards received by Team A */,
  "red_cards_b" INTEGER /* Red cards received by Team B */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the tournament */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Shirt number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left, right) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the tournament */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries sustained by the player during the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("team_iso_code") REFERENCES teams ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the World Cup */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* Country that hosted the tournament */,
  "winner_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the winning team */,
  "runner_up_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the runner-up team */,
  "total_teams_participating" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the tournament */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored in the tournament */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards awarded in the tournament */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards awarded in the tournament */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer in the tournament */,
  "top_scorer_team_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the team the top scorer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Match ID in which the penalty was awarded */,
  "team_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the team awarded the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., foul, handball) */,
  "penalty_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the penalty (e.g., scored, missed) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute at which the penalty was awarded */,
  "player_committed" TEXT /* Name of the player who committed the foul leading to the penalty */,
  "player_taking" TEXT /* Name of the player taking the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions assigned to this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
